description_long: This lighthouse features a cylindrical tower with alternating blue and white horizontal stripes, giving it a striking and easily recognizable appearance. The structure is topped with a large, glass-enclosed lantern room, surrounded by a gallery balcony with a protective railing. Multiple rectangular windows are distributed along the tower, providing natural light to the interior. A small annex with a door and additional windows is attached to the side of the main tower, likely serving as an entrance or utility room. The lighthouse sits on a polygonal stone or concrete base, which provides stability and a defined boundary. The overall design is utilitarian yet visually distinctive, suitable for urban waterfronts or coastal parks.
description: A blue and white striped cylindrical lighthouse with a glass lantern room, gallery balcony, and side annex, set on a polygonal stone base.
description_view_0: The view highlights the main entrance annex on the left side and the prominent gallery balcony encircling the lantern room.
description_view_1: This view shows the rear of the lighthouse, revealing more windows and the full extent of the gallery balcony.
description_view_2: The side annex with its door and windows is clearly visible, along with the alternating color bands and the lantern room above.
description_view_3: The opposite side of the tower is shown, emphasizing the cylindrical shape, color bands, and the polygonal base.
